titles.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory Upon One Who Steps on a man's Abdomen Causing Him to Soil His Clothes
Chapter on What is Obligatory Upon One Who Steps on a man's Abdomen Causing Him to Soil His Clothes

segments: 5326 - فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ : "أَنَّ رَجُلاً رُفِعَ إِلَى عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ قَدْ دَاسَ بَطْنَ رَجُلٍ حَتَّى أَحْدَثَ فِي ثِيَابِهِ فَقَضَى عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْهِ "أَنْ يُدَاسَ بَطْنُهُ حَتَّى يُحْدِثَ كَمَا أَحْدَثَ أَوْ يَغْرَمَ ثُلُثَ اَلدِّيَةِ" ".
arabic.text: 5326 - فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ : "أَنَّ رَجُلاً رُفِعَ إِلَى عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ قَدْ دَاسَ بَطْنَ رَجُلٍ حَتَّى أَحْدَثَ فِي ثِيَابِهِ فَقَضَى عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْهِ "أَنْ يُدَاسَ بَطْنُهُ حَتَّى يُحْدِثَ كَمَا أَحْدَثَ أَوْ يَغْرَمَ ثُلُثَ اَلدِّيَةِ" ".

segments:
Hadith.5326 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni, it is reported that a man was brought to Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) who had trampled on another man's stomach until he defecated in his clothes. Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) ruled:
"His stomach should be trampled until he defecates as the victim did, or he must pay one-third of the blood money (diyyah)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5326 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni, it is reported that a man was brought to Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) who had trampled on another man's stomach until he defecated in his clothes. Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) ruled:
"His stomach should be trampled until he defecates as the victim did, or he must pay one-third of the blood money (diyyah)."
